{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40563", "cvss": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}], "description": "### Description:
Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in Apache Atlas.

Apache Atlas exposes a DSL search endpoint that accepts user-supplied query strings. Attacker can alter Gremlin traversal logic within grammar-allowed characters to access unintended data.


### Affected Version:
This issue affects Apache Atlas: from 0.8-incubating through 2.4.0.


For affected versions >= 2.0.0, the vulnerability is only exploitable when Atlas is deployed with below non-default configuration.


`atlas.dsl.executor.traversal=false`


### Mitigation:
Users are recommended to upgrade to version 2.5.0, which fixes the issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00464, "percentile": 0.36574}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-35xx-9xrg-gwhf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-08T17:46:27Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-35xx-9xrg-gwhf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-35xx-9xrg-gwhf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40563"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-04T16:16:02Z", "published_at": "2026-05-04T18:30:29Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40563", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/vd0oggmqxl2k1skm0z2f9p0plx7jhmfl", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/03/9", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-35xx-9xrg-gwhf"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/atlas", "summary": "Apache Atlas has a Code Injection Vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T17:47:13Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-35xx-9xrg-gwhf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.5.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.atlas:apache-atlas"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.8, < 2.5.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Atlas has a Code Injection Vulnerability
